title: What's new in Looker: Empowering business users in the governed agentic era
summary: Google Cloud presented advancements in Looker that integrate Gemini AI into business intelligence. The updates include dashboard agents for workflow automation, conversational analytics, and a governed semantic layer to ground AI in trusted data for enterprise use.
writeup: This video covers new Looker capabilities that bring Gemini AI into business intelligence, including dashboard agents for workflow automation, conversational analytics, and a governed semantic layer. The semantic layer matters because it grounds AI outputs in trusted enterprise data, addressing the reliability concerns that come with agentic systems. The concrete takeaways: agents handle BI workflows, natural language drives analysis, and governance keeps model responses anchored to vetted data.
